rulings.Case Title: UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP VS. GUAN SHAO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SALE OF DWELLING
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 8, 2024 line 1. HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SALE OF DWELLING is OFF CALENDER per Notice of Withdrawal of NNDS, LLC's Application for Order for Sale of Dwelling filed on March 21, 2024. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MALCOLM DRILLING COMPANY, INC. VS. SWINERTON WEBCOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Release Mechanics Lien Of Tishman Construction Corporation Of California
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 8, 2024 line 2. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RELEASE MECHANICS LIEN OF TISHMAN CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA is DENIED. Plaintiff meets the definition of requirement of a person that provides work authorized for work of improvement as those terms are used in Civ. Code, Sections 8400 and 8408. Gross v. Hazeltine (1930) 107 Cal. App. 446 and Glassco v. El Sereno Country Club (1932) 217 Cal. 90 are distinguishable. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH G. ROMERO VS. ALBERTO TOLEDO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 8, 2024 line 5. DEFENDANT RAUL HERNANDEZ'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. 5 days to answer from the notice of the entry of order. Plaintiff alleges to have both capacity and standing; whether he does or not is a factual issue which is not amenable for resolution for demurrer. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 370 ELLIS STREET, LLC VS. FREDERICK NICHOLSON II ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 8, 2024 line 8. PLAINTIFF 370 ELLIS STREET, LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, TO ESTABLISH ADMISSIONS FROM DEFENDANT, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections and produce responsive documents within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff's Request for Admissions (Set One) is deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $460 calculated as $200/hour for two hours and $60 filing fee. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
